title: setaria setosa var. leiophylla
intro: Setaria setosa var. leiophylla, also known as yellow foxtail or yellow bristle grass, is a species of grass that is native to North America and is often found growing in dry, sandy soils. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Setaria setosa var. leiophylla include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically to the skin.
